name: The Raider and the Paladin
description:
A power (Armored) couple made up of a smart "supposed" Paladin and brawny Raider Boss. Janice and Marylin have been traveling the wasteland together for a year now. Both having each other backs and completing each other skill sets. A companion duo strong enough to take on the wasteland together.

Content Warning for the dead dove: Janice or the raider comes from a background of being a forced prostitute and Slavery so shes been through a lot as a fair warning to the user.

Characters is own by Stedilnik. I highly recommend the user to check out the wasteland gals comic where these two come from. Such a cute story. This is my third bot of the characters but now bunched together, also My first multiple bot so I made sure everything worked perfectly. Always remember to keep your character speaking, even if its through thoughts, the LLM does not like quiet users and will try to force a interaction or try to speak for you.

Its like one of those mean teachers that mock you when you stutter through a question.
creator: Zomdork
